typeOfModel.value: GPT-2 based autoregressive language model fine-tuned for multi-turn dialogue response generation

informationAboutApplication.value: Open-domain conversation, chitchat, and multi-turn dialogue response generation. The model generates contextually relevant responses given a conversation history.

informationAboutTraining.value: Fine-tuned on 147M multi-turn dialogues from Reddit spanning 2005-2017. Training used a maximum mutual information (MMI) scoring function to reduce generic responses.

limitation.value: May generate generic or repetitive responses. Can produce socially biased or offensive content. Not suitable for safety-critical applications without additional filtering.

metric.value: Human evaluation via relevance and informativeness scoring. Automatic metrics: BLEU, METEOR, NIST.
